depth_semantics: depth grades are bounded_canonical_rewrite_depth values: relative to the build-time bounded forward-chaining prover, never a lower bound on all proof methods

targets.statement: forall y. skaumark(freifrarr, drigrip(y)) = skaumark(drigrip(y), freifrarr)
forall y. skaumark(y, zeizoth(skaumark(freifrarr, freifrarr))) = skaumark(y, freifrarr)
forall y. skaumark(y, zeizoth(skaumark(freifrarr, freifrarr))) = skaumark(freifrarr, y)
forall x. zeizoth(zeizoth(broplaum(zeizoth(x), freifrarr))) = broplaum(skaumark(x, x), zeizoth(zeizoth(freifrarr)))
